motivational: Success is not final, failure is not fatal. It is the courage to continue that counts.
Focus on being productive instead of busy.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
Excellence is not a destination; it is a continuous journey that never ends.
Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
The key to success is to focus on goals, not obstacles.
Great things never came from comfort zones.
You are what you repeatedly do. Excellence is not an act but a habit.
The difference between who you are and who you want to be is what you do.
Wake up with determination. Go to bed with satisfaction.
Don't stop until you're proud.
Push yourself harder today and tomorrow becomes easier.
Dream bigger. Do bigger.
Success doesn't just find you. You have to go out and get it.
The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
Everything you want is on the other side of fear.
Believe you can and you're halfway there.
Your limitation—it's only your imagination.
Stay focused on your goal.
quranic: Indeed, with hardship comes ease. (Quran 94:5)
Do not lose hope in the mercy of Allah. Surely none loses hope in the mercy of Allah except the people who disbelieve. (Quran 12:87)
So verily, with every difficulty, there is relief. (Quran 94:5)
And He is with you wherever you are. (Quran 57:4)
So rely upon Allah; surely you are on the clear truth. (Quran 27:79)
There is no compulsion in religion. (Quran 2:256)
Indeed, Allah is with those who are patient. (Quran 2:153)
Call upon Me; I will respond to you. (Quran 40:60)
Verily in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest. (Quran 13:28)
O you who have believed, seek help through patience and prayer. (Quran 2:153)
Say, 'Indeed, my prayer, my rites of sacrifice, my living and my dying are for Allah. (Quran 6:162)
And your Lord says, 'Call upon Me; I will respond to you.' (Quran 40:60)
Every soul shall taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial. (Quran 21:35)
Perhaps you hate a thing and it is good for you; and perhaps you love a thing and it is bad for you. (Quran 2:216)
Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear. (Quran 2:286)
Verily, with patience and perseverance, all things are possible.
The best of people are those who are most beneficial to others.
Knowledge is not what is memorized; knowledge is what benefits.
Work for this life as if you will live forever, and work for the afterlife as if you will die tomorrow.
In the remembrance of Allah do hearts find tranquility. (Quran 13:28)
